items.question: What is CompareAE?
items.answer: CompareAE is an independent informational discovery platform that helps you learn about licensed insurance providers in the UAE and their coverage features. We are not an insurance company, broker, or financial advisor.

items.question: Is the service free?
items.answer: Yes, the service is completely free. There are no hidden fees and no obligations.

items.question: How does CompareAE earn money?
items.answer: We may earn a referral commission when you visit a provider's website through our links. This does not affect the independence of our informational content or how providers are listed.

items.question: Do you collect my personal data?
items.answer: No. We are an informational platform that does not collect your personal data or request insurance information. Any data you enter is submitted directly on the licensed provider's website.

items.question: How many providers do you feature?
items.answer: We feature information about licensed insurance providers in the UAE, and we continuously expand the list with independent content.

items.question: Can I buy insurance through the platform?
items.answer: No. We are an informational platform only. When you choose a provider, we direct you to their official website to complete any step directly with them.

items.question: What insurance types do you cover?
items.answer: We provide information about car, health, travel, home, life, and business insurance.

items.question: Do you recommend or advise a specific company?
items.answer: No. We don't rank providers by preference, give personal recommendations, or provide pricing. We only provide independent information so you can decide for yourself.

about.heroSubtitle: An independent discovery platform for insurance providers in the UAE
about.missionP1: We help users in the UAE discover licensed insurance providers. That's why we built CompareAE as an independent, transparent informational discovery platform that helps UAE residents make informed decisions.
about.missionP2: We don't sell insurance and we are not brokers. We provide independent information about licensed providers to help you make your own decision.
about.editorialDesc: We don't favor any provider over another or give recommendations. We present information with full transparency.
about.noDataDesc: We are an informational platform that does not collect your personal data or request insurance information.
about.supportDesc: A local support team is available to help with any inquiry.

disclaimer.heroSubtitle: Important information about the nature of our services
disclaimer.mainText: CompareAE is an independent informational discovery platform, not an insurance company, broker, or financial advisor.
disclaimer.s1Text: CompareAE provides an informational platform to learn about licensed insurance providers in the United Arab Emirates. We don't display prices, collect customer data, sell insurance, or provide financial or insurance advice.
disclaimer.s2Text: Although we strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information, we don't guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of the information shown. Coverage and information are finalized directly by the licensed provider.
disclaimer.s3Text: The content provided on this platform is for informational purposes only and does not in any way constitute financial, insurance, or legal advice. We strongly recommend consulting a qualified financial or insurance advisor before making any insurance-related decisions.
disclaimer.s4Text: CompareAE may earn commissions from some insurance companies listed on the platform when users visit the provider's website through our links. This does not affect the independence of our informational content or how providers are listed. We maintain editorial independence and do not favor any provider over another due to commercial relationships.
disclaimer.s5Text: The user is responsible for verifying all offer and coverage details directly with insurance companies before completing any purchase. CompareAE is not responsible for any losses or damages resulting from reliance on the information shown on the platform.
disclaimer.s6Text: The platform may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those websites.
disclaimer.s7Text: We reserve the right to amend this disclaimer at any time. We recommend reviewing this page periodically for any changes.
disclaimer.contactPrefix: For any questions about this disclaimer, please contact us at:

terms.s1Text: By using the CompareAE platform, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree to any of these terms, please do not use the platform.
terms.s2Text: CompareAE is an independent informational discovery platform that helps users learn about licensed insurance providers in the UAE. We are not an insurance company, insurance broker, or financial advisor.
terms.s3Text: We strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information, but we don't guarantee the accuracy or completeness of the information shown. Coverage and information may change and are subject to the licensed providers' terms, and we don't display prices.
s4Bullets: Verifying offer details directly with insurance companies
Making informed decisions based on your needs
terms.s5Text: The information provided on the platform is for informational purposes only and does not constitute insurance or financial advice. We recommend consulting specialists before making any insurance decisions.
terms.s6Text: All content, designs, and logos on the platform are the intellectual property of CompareAE and protected under intellectual property laws.
terms.s7Text: We reserve the right to amend these terms at any time. Amendments will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date.
terms.s8Text: These terms are governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the United Arab Emirates.
terms.s9Text: For any questions about these terms, please contact us at:

privacy.s1Text: At CompareAE we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our platform.
privacy.s2Intro: CompareAE is an informational platform that does not collect personal insurance data (such as vehicle data) and does not request it. We may only collect:
s2Bullets: Contact form data when you message us (name and email only)
privacy.s3Intro: We use your information for the following purposes:
s3Bullets: Operating the site and displaying informational content
Responding to your messages via the contact form
privacy.s4Text: We don't sell or share your personal information with third parties except when necessary to provide the requested service or as required by law. We may share anonymized data for analytics purposes.
privacy.s5Text: We use the latest encryption and security technologies to protect your data. However, the security of information transmitted over the internet cannot be fully guaranteed.
s6Bullets: Object to the processing of your data
privacy.s7Text: For any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at:

trustPage.heroSubtitle: We are committed to the highest standards of transparency and independence in all our operations
trustPage.mainDisclaimerText: CompareAE is an independent informational discovery platform, not an insurance company, broker, or financial advisor.
trustPage.p1Text: We present information about licensed insurance providers in the UAE independently. We don't rank providers by preference or recommend any provider over another.
p1Bullets: We present information as provided by the companies
We don't display prices; they are set directly by the provider
The final decision rests with the user
trustPage.p2Text: The editorial content on our site is fully independent of commercial partnerships. Guides and educational articles are written to help users understand insurance, not to promote any company.
trustPage.p3Text: We are fully transparent about our commercial relationships. We may earn commissions from some insurance companies when a purchase is completed through our platform.
trustPage.p3NoteText: CompareAE may earn commissions from some partners. This does not affect our editorial content or informational methodology.
trustPage.p4Text: We are an informational platform that does not collect your personal data or request insurance information. Any data you enter is submitted directly on the licensed provider's website.
p4Bullets: We don't pass your data to any party
trustPage.notIntro: For full clarity, we confirm that CompareAE is not:
trustPage.notConclusionPre: We are an independent informational discovery platform
trustPage.notConclusionPost: that helps users learn about licensed insurance providers in the UAE.
